hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && pnpm dlx code-baseline@latest scan "$FILE_PATH" --config baseline.toml --format compact 1>&2 || true

skills.name: debug
